# AI1stSEO Business Directory
# AI-optimized business listings for Ottawa and Canada
# https://ai1stseo.com

# We explicitly welcome AI crawlers to index our directory

User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

# Directory structure
# /listing/[business-slug]          - Individual business profiles
# /category/[city]/[type]           - Category pages (e.g., /category/ottawa/dentists)
# /top-10/[category]/[city]         - Top 10 ranking pages
# /compare/[business-a]/[business-b] - Side-by-side comparisons

# Sitemap for AI crawlers
Sitemap: https://ai1stseo.com/sitemap-ai.xml
Sitemap: https://ai1stseo.com/sitemap-listings.xml
